channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's Retribution: Key Elections in Indiana, Ohio, Michigan
item.description: Donald Trump's efforts to influence Republican candidates continue Tuesday night with elections in Indiana, Ohio and Michigan.

item.title: Shooting at Dallas-area shopping center leaves two dead, suspect detained
item.description: Two people were killed in a shooting at a Dallas-area shopping center Tuesday. Police report the suspect is now in custody.

item.title: Coast Guard Seeks Information About Mystery Sailboat in Lynette Hooker Probe
item.description: The U.S. Coast Guard is investigating a sailboat potentially moored near Lynette Hooker's boat the night she vanished.

item.title: LIVE: Secretary Rubio addresses Iran, ABC News Live
item.description: Continuous coverage of current events and live broadcasts.
